text: [Apply Gold Loan] Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Loan Tenure: The minimum repayment term is 1 month and the maximum repayment term is 12 months. The repayment (principal plus interest) must be completed within 365 days.
section: Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Loan Tenure

text: [Apply Gold Loan] Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Interest Rates: The maximum Annual Percentage Rate (APR) is 26.90% per annum (Chola Welfare loan Scheme) for all CIFCL branches, excluding stamp duty (if applicable, as per state laws). T&C apply
section: Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Interest Rates

text: [Apply Gold Loan] Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Interest Calculation Method:: Interest will be calculated based on the actual number of days for which the loan is outstanding, from the date the loan is disbursed to the date it is fully repaid The customer will be allowed to close the loan any time during the tenure of the loan. However, if the customer closes the loan within 15 days of disbursement, he/she will be liable to pay at least 15 days of interest.
section: Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Interest Calculation Method:

text: [Apply Gold Loan] Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Charges & Penalties:: Admin fee: Up to 150 or 0.3% of loan amount + GST (whichever is higher) Sourcing fee: Up to Rs 100 + GST Legal/Recovery charges: Actuals + GST Stamping fee: As applicable Safe custody charges : Rs 5/gram per month (minimum of Rs 5) Penal charges: 30% per annum in case the customer fails to make the bullet repayment on the due date, from the date of default.
section: Gold Loan Interest and Charges > Charges & Penalties:
